name: sdk-conveyor
documentation:
# Conveyor SDK

This Python SDK is used to simplify the interaction with the Conveyor API when using Python.
The package supports Python 3.10 and above.

If you want to learn more about Conveyor, you can visit the [Conveyor website](https://conveyordata.com/).

To get started with the SDK, you can take a look at the [Conveyor docs](https://docs.conveyordata.com/how-to-guides/developer-tooling/python-sdk).
For the technical reference of the SDK, take a look at the [technical reference](https://docs.conveyordata.com/technical-reference/python-sdk).

classes.name: conveyor.runner.task_runner.CancelledException
documentation: Raised when the log streaming was interrupted.

methods.name: conveyor.runner.task_runner.TaskRunner.start
documentation: Runs your task.

methods.name: conveyor.runner.task_submitter.TaskSubmitter.start
documentation:
Starts running each of the specified tasks without waiting for them to finish.
Returns as soon as all tasks have been submitted to your cluster.

methods.name: conveyor.runner.task_submitter.TaskSubmitter.run
documentation:
Runs the collection of tasks. Whenever a task finishes, its accompanying ApplicationRunResult is emitted.

Returns:
-- The iterator that produces the results for your tasks.

modules.name: conveyor.secrets
documentation:
This file is intended to reflect the structure of data-plane/airflow/src/conveyor_airflow_plugins/secrets.py
If you modify a function signature or add an implementation in this file,
please implement the corresponding change there as well.

methods.name: conveyor.project.build.ProjectBuilder.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the project builder.

Keyword arguments:
project_path -- The file path to your project root, this can be relative to the current file.
build_args (optional) -- A sequence of optional build arguments to be passed to the Docker context.
    Each element of the sequence should typically be of the form `key=value`.

methods.name: conveyor.project.build.ProjectBuilder.build
documentation:
Trigger the container build process for your project.

Returns:
-- The build ID belonging to the produced build artefact.

methods.name: conveyor.project.project.ProjectApi.get_registry_url
documentation: Returns the URL of the container registry for your project.
